objective: Adaptar o comportamento fluido/tutor do Hermes para o OpenWebUI HVAC, mantendo evidência rotulada e gates de segurança.

used_for: MiniMax M2.7 as preferred reasoning model
secret handling and internal-only service posture
separation between code, sessions, memory, logs, and volatile data
next-step guidance instead of form-like questioning
anti-patterns for asking too many fields

router_changes: hvac-copilot now reads the multi-turn message history instead of judging only the latest user message.
conversation_state extracts and reuses brand, family, alarm_code, subcode, outdoor_model, indoor_model, and previous_answers.
follow-up questions build an effective query from current turn, recent turns, and stored state.
deterministic guided responses cover Daikin VRV E4 and common U4 follow-ups to avoid unnecessary model requests.
safety gates block energized IPM/electrical testing without explicit manual context.
out-of-domain consumer appliances such as frost-free refrigerators are blocked.

fallback_policy.manual_family: Family/model-series retrieval when exact model is not found.
fallback_policy.graph_internal: Guided triage and internal router knowledge for common HVAC fault families.
fallback_policy.external_official: MiniMax official web_search is tried first when a compatible endpoint and API key are configured in the runtime environment.
fallback_policy.web_fallback: DuckDuckGo HTML fallback is tried when official search is unavailable or returns no usable results.

validations.curl http://10.0.0.1:4017/v1/models: fail: no 10.0.0.1 interface/reachability on this host
validations.curl http://10.0.0.1:4017/health: fail: no 10.0.0.1 interface/reachability on this host

remaining_issues: The requested validation address 10.0.0.1:4017 is not reachable from this host because no 10.0.0.1 interface is present. The service is healthy on 127.0.0.1:4017 and OpenWebUI uses localhost.
MiniMax official web_search requires runtime environment configuration for a compatible endpoint and API key. No new credentials were committed.
